---
title: "Archive"
---

> Historical source-of-truth content imported from outside the repo
> (cloud drives, old proposals, vendor docs). **Large vendor binaries**
> and pre-hosted media already represented elsewhere are catalogued in
> [external-index.qmd](external-index.qmd) rather than copied.

## Buckets

Buckets are filesystem dumps under `archive/` — there is no per-bucket
rendered page. Use a local clone to browse contents; this table is the
inventory. Files over ~25 MB get an external-index entry instead of a
copy (git-lfs carries the rest — see `.gitattributes`).

| Bucket | Description | Files |
|---|---|---|
| _(none yet)_ | TODO: add a row per imported bucket | — |

See [external-index.qmd](external-index.qmd) for files that stay at
their original cloud paths.
